title: Whatsapp x Twilio x Monday
excerpt:
Actually, I use Twilio app on monday to send SMS. 
Is it possible to do the same work with whatsapp message ?

posts.author: Sebastien18 (Passinge)
posts.cookedHtml:
Actually, I use Twilio app on monday to send SMS.
Is it possible to do the same work with whatsapp message ?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Sebastien18

There are a number of apps in the monday marketplace that will send messages via WhatsApp. Just go to the marketplace and search for “whatsapp”.

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: Sebastien18 (Passinge)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JCorrell ,
I know it, but I am using Twilio already and I want to send whatsapp message by Twilio.
I ask your team to develop that feature, it will be great.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Sebastien18

I don’t work for monday. I recommend reposting your need as a feature request so it will have a better chance of getting to the right people in monday.

Jim - The Monday Man

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml: Supersend is one app on the app marketplace that helps you send WhatsApp messages from monday. Although it doesn’t support sending WhatsApp messages with Twilio, I’m sure that feature could be built in if you could share more about how you expect that work.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
have you tried whatsapp notify, the exact app I was looking, there was none so I made myself
